role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of linguistic cues (no signs) and remained silent in Phase 2.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil color, and vegetation density.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant morphology (sclerophyllous, twisted) and biome types (Cerrado).
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings, shoulder width, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Evaluated camera generation (Gen 4) and cross-domain consistency.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Brazil by leveraging the botanics agent's identification of the Cerrado biome and the meta agent's recognition of the Google Gen 4 camera signature. The agents stayed within their domains, and the tournament logic was sound.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Red soil and scrubland accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road markings and shoulders accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Image quality assessment matches the visual input.
